title: Practice Session Learning Unit + Tacit Detail Basic UI
goal: Add a minimal current-learning-unit view-model and text-first tacit detail panel to /practice/session/:sessionId using existing step-group/tacit bundle data, without changing engine rules, store persistence, or sim/admin flows.
constraints: Keep src/stores/practiceStore.ts, src/lib/practice/runtime.ts, src/lib/practice/queries.ts, and src/types/practice.ts unchanged unless a blocker is proven from code
Determine the current learning unit from engineState.node_progress plus bundle.step_group_nodes and grouped recipe nodes; do not infer it only from derived.legalActions
Do not change LegalAction shape, engine rules, persistence flow, session DB writes, or sim routes/pages
Treat tacit media rendering, PracticeMenuPage preview expansion, PracticeAdminPage authoring, and debug console work as out of scope
No any, as any, ts-ignore, eslint-disable, admin/game cross-import, display:none, or inline filter/map inside Zustand selectors
No extra changes outside the approved write set and the session-start dirty snapshot baseline
acceptance: A pure helper can derive a stable current step group/learning unit from existing bundle plus progress data even when duplicate ingredient IDs exist across different recipe nodes
The helper returns current step-group summary plus sorted text tacit items without React, Zustand, or Supabase imports and is covered by tests
PracticeSessionPage shows the current step group's title, summary, primary location label, and tacit text details with safe empty states
Existing legal action buttons, ghost guide wording, session lifecycle, and persistence behavior remain unchanged
PracticeMenuPage, PracticeAdminPage, sim routes/pages, tacit media rendering, and debug console remain unchanged
npm run build, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run test, and npm run lint complete with no new warnings/errors beyond the pre-existing warning at src/hooks/useGameTick.ts:73
